artifacts_policy: Generated CMake build files and transcript were kept outside this metadata repo. No generated binaries, copied source, private assets, or restricted SDK material are committed.
next_actions: build brender_core_float from the generated Visual Studio project
triage first compiler blocker before changing readiness beyond configure-complete
public_notes: This records the first successful configure pass for the portable BRender core harness. It establishes that the generated scaffold can produce out-of-tree Visual Studio build files.
result_summary: CMake configured with Visual Studio 18 2026, detected MSVC 19.50.35721.0, and generated build files in the external configure workspace.
